hooks.command: if [[ "$TOOL_INPUT" == *".go"* ]]; then filepath=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"[^"]*\.go"' | head -1 | tr -d '"'); [ -n "$filepath" ] && [ -f "$filepath" ] && gofmt -w "$filepath"; fi

if [[ "$TOOL_INPUT" == *".py"* ]]; then filepath=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"[^"]*\.py"' | head -1 | tr -d '"'); [ -n "$filepath" ] && [ -f "$filepath" ] && black --quiet "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; fi
